pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source property to target Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8 language features, preventing the use of Java 11 APIs and syntax.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler target property to target Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the generated bytecode is compatible with Java 8, which may cause runtime issues or prevent execution on Java 11-only environments.
